title: About 12% of U.S. teens turn to AI for emotional support or advice
description: General purpose tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Grok are not designed for this use, making mental health professionals wary.

title: US tells diplomats to lobby against foreign data sovereignty laws
description: The Trump administration has ordered U.S. diplomats to lobby against countries' attempts to regulate how American tech companies handle foreigners' data.

title: Harbinger acquires autonomous driving company Phantom AI
description: It's the Los Angeles trucking startup's first acquisition — the latest in a series of moves to spin up new revenue streams.

title: Jira’s latest update allows AI agents and humans to work side by side
description: Atlassian is unveiling "agents in Jira" which gives users the ability to assign and manage work given to AI agents the same as humans.

title: Y Combinator grad and AI insurance brokerage Harper raises $47M
description: Harper is an AI-native insurance brokerage that just raised a $45 million combined Series A and seed, after a member of YC's Winter 2025 cohort.

title: Amazon’s AI-powered Alexa+ gets new personality options
description: Users will be able to choose from Alexa styles like Brief, Chill or Sweet, Amazon says.

title: Adobe Firefly’s video editor can now automatically create a first draft from footage
description: Adobe Firefly is getting a new feature called Quick Cut that uses AI to edit footage to create a first draft of the final video based on user instructions.

title: Khosla’s Keith Rabois backs Comp, which wants to bolster HR teams with AI
description: The HR tech startup, which currently operates in Brazil, has raised a $17.25 million Series A.

title: India’s AI boom pushes firms to trade near-term revenue for users
description: ChatGPT and rivals are testing whether India's massive AI user boom can translate into paying customers as free offers wind down.

title: Nvidia challenger AI chip startup MatX raised $500M
description: The startup was founded by former Google TPU engineers in 2023.

title: Self-driving tech startup Wayve raises $1.2B from Nvidia, Uber, and three automakers
description: Major automakers, tech giants, AI companies, and chipmakers are all trying to get a piece of Wayve.

title: Spanish ‘soonicorn’ Multiverse Computing releases free compressed AI model
description: Spanish startup Multiverse Computing has released a new version of its HyperNova 60B model on Hugging Face that, it says, bests Mistral's model.

title: Apple rolls out age-verification tools worldwide to comply with growing web of child safety laws
description: Apple complies with new age-assurance laws in the U.S. and abroad, including those that block users from downloading apps aimed at adults.

title: Uber engineers built an AI version of their boss
description: Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi said the company’s employees have gone all in on AI, going so far as to build a chatbot of him that they use to practice their pitches.

title: Former L3Harris Trenchant boss jailed for selling hacking tools to Russian broker
description: Peter Williams, the former head of U.S. hacking tools maker L3Harris Trenchant, was sentenced to seven years in prison for stealing and selling his former company’s hacking and surveillance tools to a Russian firm.

title: Google’s new 1.9GW clean energy deal includes massive 100-hour battery
description: Form Energy's iron-air batteries will store wind and solar power to keep the data center running 24/7.

title: Xiaomi’s magnetic power bank is incredibly thin
Apple brings age verification to UK users in iOS 26.4 beta
You can now make Alexa’s AI personality more friendly, blunt, or chilled out
Adobe’s new AI video editing tool stitches clips into a first draft
